# discord_stage_channel (Resource)

A resource to create a stage channel (Discord channel type 13). Stage channels separate speakers from audience; only stage moderators (members with Manage Channels + Mute Members + Move Members on the channel) can start the stage and invite speakers.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_stage_channel" "events" {
  server_id = var.server_id
  name      = "Events Stage"
  category  = discord_category_channel.members.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the channel.
- `server_id` (String) Which server the channel will be in.

### Optional

- `bitrate` (Number) Bitrate of the channel.
- `category` (String) ID of the category to place the channel under.
- `position` (Number) Position of the channel.
- `sync_perms_with_category` (Boolean) Whether to sync permissions with the parent category.
- `user_limit` (Number) User limit of the channel.

### Read-Only

- `channel_id` (String) The ID of the channel.
- `id` (String) The ID of the channel.
